login.termsHint: By continuing, you agree to our terms and privacy policy. SafeSpace never deletes your YouTube comments.
login.footer: Built for YouTube and Instagram creators who want to take back control of their attention.
login.errorAuth: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

dashboard.subtitle: Your community sent you messages. SafeSpace filters them for you.
dashboard.connectDesc: We'll fetch your last 7 days of comments, classify them by category, and hide toxicity. No comment is ever deleted from YouTube.
dashboard.videosEmpty: No videos with comments in the last 7 days. Run a sync to fetch.
dashboard.viewAllInFeed: See all comments in the Clean Feed →
dashboard.pendingClassification: {count, plural, one {# comment pending classification} other {# comments pending classification}} — run another sync.

checkin.question: How are you feeling today?
checkin.subtitle: One second to check in. No one else sees this.
checkin.doneFelt: You felt {mood} today {emoji}. Have a good one.

tldr.titleWithInsights: What your community is telling you
tldr.titleEmpty: Your first summary is one click away
tldr.subtitle: Analyzed {time} · {count, plural, one {# comment} other {# comments}}
tldr.errorGeneration: Generation failed. Try again in a moment.
tldr.noticeInsufficient: Not enough classified comments yet (minimum 5). Run a sync.
tldr.noticeEmpty: Generate the TL;DR of your last 7 days via Gemini.

feed.title: Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Your comments sorted by relevance — questions and feedback first, toxicity hidden at the bottom.
feed.noChannelDesc: Connect your YouTube channel to see comments sorted by relevance.
feed.emptyHidden: Nothing to hide right now. Calm vibes.

comment.maskedHover: Hover to reveal. The comment is still visible on YouTube — only hidden in your feed.

wall.title: Support Wall
wall.subtitle: The words that lift you up, to read again on hard days.
wall.count: {count, plural, one {# message on your wall} other {# messages on your wall}}
wall.placeholder: "Your videos help me keep going. Don't stop."
wall.checkinSubtitle: No need to open your comments today. Here are the messages that lifted you up recently.
wall.emptyTitle: Your wall is empty for now
wall.emptyDesc: Go to the Clean Feed and click Support Wall under your favorite comments. Or write a note yourself via the "Add manually" button.

reply.title: Quick Reply
reply.subtitle: Reply to ten similar questions in one move. The AI groups what's similar and proposes 3 drafts per group.
reply.emptyDesc: When new questions arrive, we'll group them here so you can reply in one move.
reply.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {# question awaiting reply} other {# questions awaiting reply}}
reply.explainer: The AI can group similar ones and propose 3 reply drafts per group.
reply.noGroupsFound: No relevant groups found. Try again with more questions.
reply.sendCta: Send to {count, plural, one {# person} other {# people}}
reply.errorPro: This feature is reserved for the Pro plan.

stats.title: Protected stats
stats.subtitle: Community score, positive/negative ratio, top topics and peak hours — without anxious badges.
stats.scoreEmpty: Not enough data yet to draw the curve.
stats.topicsEmpty: Not enough questions to extract topics.
stats.peakEmpty: No comments yet to compute peak hours.
stats.noChannelDesc: Connect your YouTube channel to see your stats.

ratio.title: Positive / negative ratio
ratio.positiveCount: {count, plural, one {# positive} other {# positives}} over {days}d

connections.title: Connections
connections.noChannelDesc: Connect your YouTube channel to start the analysis.
connections.limitReached: You've reached the limit of the {plan} plan.

banners.ytConnectedDesc: Run a first sync to fetch the last 7 days of comments.

ytReasons.state_mismatch: Invalid OAuth session. Try again from this page.
ytReasons.token_exchange: Google rejected the code exchange. Try again.
ytReasons.no_channel: No YouTube channel found on this Google account.
ytReasons.db: Save error. Try again in a moment.
ytReasons.access_denied: You denied access. SafeSpace needs these permissions to fetch your comments.

banners.ytDisconnectedDesc: We won't touch your comments anymore. You can reconnect whenever you want.
banners.syncErrorDesc: YouTube returned an error. Check the permissions or try again later.
banners.stripeSuccessDesc: Your subscription is active. Quick Reply, 90d Stats and everything else are unlocked.
banners.stripeCancelDesc: You can restart checkout from this page anytime.
banners.stripeErrorDesc: Check your Stripe configuration (price ID, keys) or try again.
banners.stripeNoCustomerDesc: You haven't subscribed yet. Go Pro to enable the Stripe portal.
banners.stripeSyncedProDesc: Pro plan active. Everything is unlocked.
banners.stripeSyncedFreeDesc: Stripe doesn't return any active subscription for this account.
banners.recoveryTitle: Stripe subscription possibly out of sync
banners.recoveryDesc: You have a Stripe customer linked but your plan is still Free. The webhook may have missed an event.

filterMode.title: Filter level
filterMode.subtitle: Decide from what toxicity level a comment is hidden in the Clean Feed. You can change anytime.
filterMode.sensitiveDesc: Hides at the slightest negative signal. For fragile days.
filterMode.standardDesc: Hides only personal attacks, harassment, spam.
filterMode.toughDesc: Only hides the most violent comments. You see almost everything.

display.title: Display
display.subtitle: Preferences to reduce daily anxiety.
display.shieldDesc: Hide all vanity metrics (subscribers, views) so you don't compare.
display.languageHint: The AI will reply in this language (TL;DR, reply drafts).

reclassify.title: Re-classify comments
reclassify.desc: Force a new AI pass over all existing comments. Useful if you change the filter level or if the previous classification was off.

subscription.titleFree: All the essentials to get started
